vocab.database: Use Mongoose for schema definitions and type safety. Define schemas with mongoose.Schema(), register models with mongoose.model(). Use mongoose.connect() once at app startup — share the connection.
vocab.search: Use MongoDB Atlas Search (built on Lucene) for full-text search — define a search index in the Atlas UI, then query with $search aggregation stage. For basic matching, use $text operator with a text index.
vocab.aggregation: Use the aggregation pipeline for complex queries: $match (filter), $group (aggregate), $lookup (join), $project (shape output). Always put $match first to reduce document count early.
vocab.performance: Create indexes with createIndex() or Mongoose's schema.index(). Use compound indexes for multi-field queries. Use lean() in Mongoose for read-only queries — returns plain JS objects, not Mongoose documents.
vocab.schema: MongoDB is schema-flexible but use Mongoose schemas for consistency. Use SchemaType validators for required fields and types. Use schema.pre('save') hooks for data transformation before writes.
